content.text: Upscaling reconstructs lower resolutions to the native resolution using advanced algorithms, improving image quality and performance.
For DLSS Preset, use Auto if you're unsure. And for each present:
K: Transformer, best quality (default for Quality/Balanced)
L: Sharper, more stable, less ghosting (default for UltraPerf)
M: Quality of L, speed close to J/K (default for Performance)
AMD FSR is the default method. It is recommended to use the Quality mode for best results.
When ENBSeries is active, only DLAA is available.
Changes take effect after restarting the game.

content.help: NVIDIA DLSS is automatically used if available, otherwise AMD FSR is used. Changes take effect after restart. (Default: DLSS)
Controls the internal resolution. Changes take effect after restart. (Default: Quality)
Overrides the DLSS model preset. Auto lets DLSS pick the best preset per quality mode. Changes take effect after restart. (Default: Auto)
